description: Calculadora 1105. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Positive z-score: value is above the mean
Negative z-score: value is below the mean
The magnitude tells you how many standard deviations away from average
mistakes: Using sample standard deviation instead of population standard deviation
Forgetting that z-scores assume a normal distribution
